text: auto scroll refinement: if the scroll-to-element box is higher than the "srcoll-into-area"(i think its 1/5 to 4/5 or so), then scroll only so far that the edge that is closer lies on the 1/5 or 4/5. in other words: "scroll as little as possibel so that the entire "scroll-into-area" is filled with the element.

status.comment: Implemented 20%/80% scroll threshold and optimized scrolling for large elements. Verified with unit tests.
